text: hey what time are you gonna be home tonight
prob 7ish, why what's up
was thinking we order in and watch that show, no cooking tonight lol
Hey dad, still on for dinner Saturday? Thinking that new Thai place downtown
yes! saturday works. what time were u thinking
also invite ur mom if she's free, been a while since we all ate together
Dad you still on for dinner Saturday? Mom said 7
Yes beta, 7 is good. That new place or usual?
Usual one, I already told them table for 4
Hi beta, just checking in, how are you feeling today?
h, doing fine mom, bit tired but ok
ok make sure you eat something, call me tonight
J
o
h
oye bhai weekend pe free hai kya? mumma ka ghar chalte hai
haan yaar free hoon, saturday chalu? sunday cricket hai mera
saturday perfect, 11 baje nikalte hai, main gaadi le lunga
beta did you eat? send me a photo of the biryani
Raj's sugar was 7.8 this week, doctor happy
coming first weekend, keep the guest room ready
made your favorite thepla, freezing some for you
call me after your night shift, don't skip sleep
Maya's drawing is so beautiful, frame it
temple aarti was lovely today
did you log your CME credits? deadline is close
Vikram says he might have big news
Holi colors ordered from Etsy, arriving Friday
